message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow\nwith SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam participant {
  BackgroundColor<<HealthCloud>> #008000
  BackgroundColor<<Embedded Browser>> #008000
  BackgroundColor<<Apigee Edge>> #FFD700
  BackgroundColor<<Orion Health Platform>> #FFD700
}

participant "HealthCloud" as HC <<HealthCloud>>
participant "Embedded Browser" as EB <<Embedded Browser>>
rectangle "HealthSphere" {
  participant "Apigee Edge" as AE <<Apigee Edge>>
  participant "Orion Health Platform" as OHP <<Orion Health Platform>>
}

== Initial Authorization Request ==
EB -> AE: GET /authorize?response_type=code
activate AE
AE --> EB: 302 https://<redirect_url> (SAML OR token)
deactivate AE

== SAML Authentication Flow ==
rectangle "SAML Authentication" {
  EB -> AE: POST /oauth2/saml
  activate AE
  AE -> OHP: POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current
  activate OHP
  OHP -> OHP: Verify SAMLResponse
  OHP --> AE: 
  deactivate OHP
  AE -> AE: Generate authorization code
  AE --> EB: 302 https://<redirect_url>?code=<code>
  deactivate AE
}

== Token Exchange ==
HC -> AE: POST /token?code=<code>
activate AE
AE --> HC: 200 access_token + refresh_token
deactivate AE

@enduml
```
